mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hourly_sales (date, hour, order_count, total_amount, visitor_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{date}, #{hour}, #{orderCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{visitorCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE hourly_sales SET date = #{date}, hour = #{hour}, order_count = #{orderCount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, visitor_count = #{visitorCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hourly_sales WHERE date = #{date} AND hour = #{hour}
SELECT * FROM hourly_sales WHERE date = #{date} ORDER BY hour ASC
SELECT * FROM hourly_sales WHERE date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY date, hour ASC
SELECT * FROM hourly_sales ORDER BY date DESC, hour DESC
